summary: Frontend-only validation completed. Production UI build compiles, but app runtime is blocked by Firebase auth configuration error before login/landing/dashboard/campaign UI can render.

ui_bugs.issue: Blank screen on both / and /login due to uncaught Firebase initialization/auth error.

integration_issues.issue: Runtime exception: `Firebase: Error (auth/invalid-api-key)` from Firebase SDK prevents route UI rendering.

action_items: Provide valid Firebase client env values (VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY and related keys) for runtime environment used by frontend service.
Add startup guard/fallback UI around Firebase initialization so invalid/missing config does not white-screen the app.
After env fix, retest authenticated shell flows (/dashboard, /campaigns) and verify interactive elements and data-testid coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: `src/services/firebase.ts` initializes Firebase immediately with env-dependent config but no validation/error boundary handling, causing full app crash when config is invalid.
Missing test credentials source: `/app/memory/test_credentials.md` not found, so auth-flow credential-based validation could not be performed.
Several interactive controls outside audited shell components still lack `data-testid`, reducing maintainable automation coverage (not fixed by test agent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: `yarn build` passes (TS + Vite compile successful). Browser smoke tests on / and /login both render blank background and emit `PAGE ERROR: Firebase: Error (auth/invalid-api-key)`. Fix env/runtime config first, then resume UI functional validation.
rca of the issue: RCA: App wraps all routes with `AuthProvider`, which imports Firebase singleton from `src/services/firebase.ts`. Firebase auth initializes at module load using env keys. In this environment, required Vite Firebase keys are absent/invalid, causing immediate SDK error `auth/invalid-api-key` and preventing React route content render. Reproduction: open `http://127.0.0.1:3000/` or `/login`; observe blank UI and console page error. Mitigation: ensure valid VITE_FIREBASE_* env vars are injected into frontend runtime/build context and add defensive config validation/fallback error UI before calling Firebase services.
